description_long: This object is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a pointed nose cone. The exterior is painted in a disruptive camouflage pattern of blue, gray, and white, with yellow and black accent markings near the wings and fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with small stabilizers and control surfaces visible. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a tinted canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The engine exhaust is prominent at the rear, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable.
description: A modern military jet airplane with a blue-gray camouflage pattern, swept-back low wings, and a single vertical tail fin. It features a pointed nose, enclosed forward cockpit, and prominent rear engine exhaust.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, camouflage pattern, and the pointed nose cone.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the swept-back wings, single vertical stabilizer, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, horizontal stabilizers, and the tail fin.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the camouflage pattern and aerodynamic fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy.
